title: New York Is Closing In on Amazon’s Shady Delivery System
summary: Amazon delivery drivers in New York wear the company’s uniforms, follow its routes, and are tracked by its software. Yet, legally, they don’t work for Amazon. title: Israel Can’t Even Tolerate a West Bank Football Pitch
summary: At the edge of the Israeli settlement of Carmel, which cleaves the Palestinian village of Umm al-Kheir in two, a football pitch now stands in memory of Awdah Hathaleen. title: Toronto’s Transit Crisis Is a Class Crisis
summary: Toronto households spent more than CA$440 million on ride-hailing services like Uber and Lyft in 2023 — just over half of what they spent on public transit. title: Gambling Is Thousands of Years Older Than We Thought, Rewriting Human Evolution
summary: Native Americans were playing dice and other games of chance many millennia before any known cultures elsewhere.

title: The Financial Costs of the Pedestrian Death Crisis Are Still Stratospheric
summary: The human costs of the pedestrian death crisis are unacceptable even as deaths begin to fall. And the financial costs aren't any better.

title: Monday’s Headlines Only Hurt Ourselves
summary: Climate change has cost global economies tens of trillions of dollars. The U.S. is both the biggest culprit and biggest victim.

title: ‘Not quite Greggs’: TikTok creators put London’s ‘gentrified’ bakeries to the test
summary: Viral reviews of artisan cafes across the capital are sparking a debate over cost, culture – and who gets a slice of the city The video that started it all was innocuous enough: a woman in her 20s posted on TikTok about how she spends a perfect weekend in north London. On her list were the bakeries Jolene and Gail’s, and the De Beauvoir Deli. The reaction, however, was anything but. Many locals commented that they had never heard of the businesses she mentioned. One north Londoner, Moses Combe, 21, was equally incredulous. “If this is where all the north London girlies come in the morning, I’d be a bit surprised,” he said in a viral video.
